name: WScript or CScript Dropping File
notes:
This rule detects a file ending in jse, vbe, js, vba, vbs written by cscript.exe or wscript.exe

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: WScript or CScript Dropper - File
SIGMA Description: Detects a file ending in jse, vbe, js, vba, vbs written by cscript.exe or wscript.exe


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [wscript.exe or cscript.exe]
when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\users\%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\programdata%' AQL filter query
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [jse or vbe or js or vba or vbs]
TD_list: APPLY WScript or CScript Dropping File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [wscript.exe or cscript.exe]
AND when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\users\%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\programdata%' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [jse or vbe or js or vba or vbs]
RED_list: Event name: WScript or CScript Dropping File
Event description: Detects a file ending in jse, vbe, js, vba, vbs written by cscript.exe or wscript.exe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
